title: Feishu / Lark Bot Message Flow
interaction_flow: 3. main() → lark.ws.Client.start()  [long-connection WebSocket to Lark platform]
5. handle_message: extract open_id, chat_id from data.event.sender / data.event.message
6. handle_message: check PUBLIC_ACCESS / ALLOWED_USERS; reject unauthorized open_id
8c. save binary to MEDIA_DIR; return (file_path, filename)
9. handle_message: if user_input empty → send_message(chat_id|open_id, warning) and return
10. handle_message: if text starts with '/' → handle_command(open_id, cmd, chat_id) and return
12. run_agent [thread]: send_message(chat_id|open_id, '思考中...', use_card=True) → returns msg_id
13. run_agent → agent.put_task(user_input, source='feishu', images=image_paths) → returns queue dq
14. run_agent: polling loop every 3s → dq.get_nowait() → item with 'next'|'done' key
16. run_agent: if len(show)>3500 → send_message(new card '继续...'); reset msg_id
19. send_message: builds CreateMessageRequestBody(receive_id, msg_type, content/card); client.im.v1.message.create()
key_relationships: main() creates lark.Client (create_client) and lark.ws.Client for long-connection
EventDispatcherHandler dispatches im_message_receive_v1 events to handle_message
handle_message spawns run_agent thread per user message
run_agent depends_on send_message / update_message for streaming card updates
update_message depends_on LarkOpenAPI (im.v1.message.patch) — patches interactive card

branching_logic.auth_check: if not PUBLIC_ACCESS and open_id not in ALLOWED_USERS → reject
branching_logic.msg_type_routing: text | post | image | audio | file | media | share_chat | share_user | interactive | sticker | fallback
branching_logic.reply_target: chat_id present → use chat_id + receive_id_type='chat_id'; else use open_id (DM)
branching_logic.card_vs_text: use_card=True → wrap content in interactive card JSON; else plain text msg_type
branching_logic.card_overflow: if display text > 3500 chars → start new card message, continue streaming
branching_logic.file_upload_type: ext in _IMAGE_EXTS → upload as image; ext in _AUDIO_EXTS/_VIDEO_EXTS → msg_type=media; else msg_type=file

important_notes: Long-connection WebSocket mode (lark.ws.Client), not HTTP webhook
Single shared GeneraticAgent instance; agent.history is shared across all users
Streaming replies: agent emits 'next' items; bot polls every 3s and patches the card in-place
Media downloaded to PROJECT_ROOT/temp/feishu_media/ before passing to agent
APP_ID, APP_SECRET, ALLOWED_USERS loaded from mykeys (mykey.py / mykey.json)
_parse_block is a nested function inside _extract_post_content (not a module-level function)
